questionHtml:
The diagram shows a section of a polypeptide.

State the type of reaction that removes water while linking amino acids together to form polypeptides.

meta.title: State the type of reaction that removes water while linking amino acids together to form polypeptides.
breadcrumbLabels: D1.2.10. Stepwise movement of the ribosome along mRNA and linkage of amino acids by peptide bonding to the growing polypeptide chain
